name: Precision Golf Centers
about: Precision Golf Centers is an indoor practice facility focused on advancing golfers' games through state-of-the-art technology. The facility features the Foresight Sports GCQuad launch monitor to provide precise ball and club head data for analysis. Located in Torrance, CA, it offers professional instruction and access to top virtual golf courses, catering to players looking to improve their skills with data-driven feedback.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced GCQuad technology for precise swing analysis
Professional instruction tailored to individual abilities
Access to virtual world-class golf courses

simulator_hardware.notes: Provides ball and club head statistics for instant feedback

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs for lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food and drinks, so it's recommended to check with the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes on a simulator take about 1-2 hours depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Precision Golf Centers is kid-friendly with programs for juniors and youth golfers.
